vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

generated_parts.label: Center Body Pod

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: All fields must be present and correctly formatted.

verify.value: mass_est_g: 1500
verify.rule: mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.
verify.rule: Interfaces must name exact neighboring subsystem labels and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature.

verify.value: All critical joints state locking method (locknut, insert, washer, adhesive note) and torque/preload intent; bolt patterns match load direction.
verify.rule: Critical joints must state locking method and torque/preload intent.
Boundary_conditions object must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential access issues for equipment bay door due to limited space.
risk.mit: Design a larger equipment bay door or optimize internal layout.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient cooling airflow if cooling inlet is obstructed.
risk.mit: Ensure clear path for cooling airflow and design redundancy.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure if spar reinforcement is not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment and verification steps during assembly.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical harness routing issues if harness path is not optimized.
risk.mit: Optimize harness path for ease of installation and maintenance.

risk.desc: Risk of motor mount failure if bolt pattern is not correctly implemented.
risk.mit: Verify bolt pattern implementation and perform load testing.

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing bending loads from spar to motor mount
Airflow for cooling the motor pod
Heat dissipation from motor pod to wing spar
Access path for equipment bay maintenance
Electrical harness for motor pod control

integration_opportunities.description: Motor pod can be integrated with additional cooling and electrical harnesses.
Equipment bay door can be replaced with different locking mechanisms.
Wing spar reinforcement can be optimized for different load cases.

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present and named.
verify.rule: Each subsystem must include all required evidence_features in part_tree/geometry_ops.
The subsystem must have a mass estimate within the vehicle's overall mass budget.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: All interfaces are reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Each subsystem must have reciprocal interfaces with clear connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces for downstream CFD/FEA.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal expansion to affect structural integrity.
risk.mit: Implement thermal expansion joints and use materials with similar thermal expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of improper assembly leading to misalignment.
risk.mit: Include detailed assembly instructions and alignment tools.

risk.desc: Potential for salt-air corrosion affecting fasteners.
risk.mit: Use corrosion-resistant fasteners and coatings.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path

physics_paths.description: Transfers wing bending and lift loads from skin to fuselage frames
Heat from sun radiates into spar, affecting material properties
Wing bending motion is transferred to fuselage frames
Airflow pressure loads the spar

manufacturing_strategy.support: orientation: vertical, inspection: visual and CMM

verify.value: All required features and interfaces are present.
verify.rule: Each part_tree child must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops.
Mass estimate must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear in part_tree and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.

verify.value: Interfaces with adjacent subsystems are named and reciprocal.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must include connection_type, DOF, clearance_mm, and required_feature.

verify.value: Visible locking evidence on critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.

verify.value: Geometry ops are distributed across the subsystem volume.
verify.rule: Geometry_ops args.at [x,y,z] must be physically distributed across the subsystem volume.

verify.value: Uses seed-characteristic ops: chamfer, subtract, drill, channel.
verify.rule: Each child's ops must include at minimum: 1 body/shape op, 1 subtract/negative op, 1 interface/mounting op, and 1 finish op.

verify.value: Dimensions match long_range_recon_wing scale.
verify.rule: Dimensions must be physically plausible for the subsystem scale.

verify.value: Assembly order is defined in cad_brief.
verify.rule: cad_brief must include ordered assembly_sequence with tool, torque, datum per step.

verify.value: Interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm.
verify.rule: Interfaces must include fit_class (H7/h6, LC2) and stack_up_mm.

verify.value: fixture_points, thermal_zones, pressure_faces defined.
verify.rule: verify must include a boundary_conditions object with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for salt-air corrosion in offshore wind farm inspection environment.
risk.mit: Apply salt-resistant coating and regular maintenance checks.

risk.desc: High-wind launch capability may be compromised by insufficient structural reinforcement.
risk.mit: Increase spar thickness and add additional structural ribs.

risk.desc: Thermal cycling may cause material degradation over time.
risk.mit: Use temperature-resistant materials and design for thermal expansion.

risk.desc: Insufficient service access for maintenance and inspection.
risk.mit: Design larger service access panels and ensure clear access paths.

risk.desc: Potential for misalignment during assembly due to lack of datum references.
risk.mit: Add primary datum features and ensure clear assembly instructions.

integration_opportunities.description: Ensure harnesses are routed through visible raceways with strain relief geometry.
Ensure connectors are reachable without disassembling structure and have keying to prevent mis-mating.
